findings.title: Edit Profile explicitly batches parallel reads
findings.detail: The Edit Profile operation instructs to 'Read both the target profile YAML and references/profile-schema.md in a single parallel batch when entering this operation.' This is a model pattern for efficient tool call batching.

findings.title: Analyze Writer Voice prescribes parallel file reading
findings.detail: The instruction 'read all sample files in a single parallel batch before analyzing' correctly batches multiple file reads. The pre-pass flagged 'read all' as a potential issue, but in context this is already prescribing the efficient parallel pattern.

findings.title: Create Profile loads profile-schema.md but Edit Profile is the only operation with explicit batching guidance
findings.detail: Create Profile says 'Load references/profile-schema.md for the full schema definition' but does not specify batching it with any other reads. Health Check similarly reads a profile but does not specify batching the profile read with the schema load. Only Edit Profile has explicit parallel-batch guidance.
findings.action: Add parallel-batch instructions to Create Profile (batch profile-schema.md with any user-provided file reads) and Health Check (batch profile read with schema load if both are needed).

findings.title: Health Check could batch validate-profile.py and profile reading
findings.detail: Health Check runs validate-profile.py for structural validity, then assesses quality dimensions which requires reading the profile content. The script run and the profile file read are independent and could execute in a single parallel batch, saving one round-trip.
findings.action: Add instruction: 'Read the profile YAML and run scripts/validate-profile.py in a single parallel batch, then assess quality dimensions from the loaded content.'

findings.title: Load Profile sequential check-then-read could be a single read with error handling
findings.detail: Load Profile first runs list-profiles.py --check to verify existence, then reads the profile file. Since a failed file read produces a clear error, the existence check is redundant when the profile name is unambiguous. This adds one unnecessary round-trip for the common case.
findings.action: Consider reading the profile directly and falling back to list-profiles.py only when the read fails or the name is ambiguous. Alternatively, batch the check and read in parallel.

findings.title: Edit Profile post-edit validation and diff could be batched
findings.detail: After editing, the skill runs validate-profile.py then diff-profiles.py sequentially. If the diff compares old (pre-edit snapshot) vs new (post-edit), both scripts could run in parallel since diff does not depend on validation passing.
findings.action: Add instruction: 'Run validate-profile.py and diff-profiles.py in a single parallel batch after applying edits, then present combined results.'

efficiency_profile.notes: This is a single-agent conversational skill with no subagent patterns. It already demonstrates good parallelization awareness in two key operations (Edit Profile, Analyze Writer Voice). Resource loading is appropriately selective -- references are loaded per-capability rather than all-at-once. The main gaps are missing explicit batching instructions in Create Profile and Health Check operations, and minor sequential patterns in Load Profile and Edit Profile post-processing.

summary.assessment: The skill demonstrates good execution efficiency awareness with explicit parallel-batch instructions in its most complex operations. No critical or high-severity issues found. Minor improvements available in batching guidance for Create Profile and Health Check, and in reducing sequential round-trips in Load Profile.
